name: Cauliflower Soup (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the butter over medium heat.
2. Whisk in the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes to form a paste.
3. Slowly pour in the vegetable stock while whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Add the cauliflower florets and cook until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
5. Puree the soup using an immersion blender or transfer to a blender and purée.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot.
